Headline: Yellow Line Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: Board/exit all Yellow line trains on platforms # 1and #2 at the Howard station due to a track condition near the area of Howard.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?
Board/exit all Yellow line trains on platforms #1 and #2 at the Howard station.

Trains in both directions will operate via their normal routes resulting in minor delays.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include these buses:

  • #97 Skokie
  • #54A North Cicero/Skokie Blvd.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?
We are experiencing delays near the area of Howard due to a track condition.

Headline: #34 South Michigan Temporary Reroute at Michigan/126th
ShortDescription: #34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Michigan, 123rd, State, 127th and Michigan due to construction near Michigan/126th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Michigan, 123rd, State, 127th and Michigan, then will resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Michigan/126th.

Headline: #43 43rd Temporary Westbound Reroute near 43rd/King Dr.
ShortDescription: WB 43 43rd buses are temp. rerouted via 43rd, Cottage Grove, Pershing, King Drive, 43rd and over regular route, due to street blockage near 43rd/King Drive.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #43 43rd buses are temporarily rerouted via 43rd, Cottage Grove, Pershing, King Drive, 43rd and over regular route, due to street blockage near 43rd/King Drive.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Blue Line Delays
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following earlier signal problems at Forest Park. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following earlier signal problems at Forest Park.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #152 Addison Temporary Westbound Reroute near Addison/Melvina
ShortDescription: WB 152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near Addison/Melvina.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted via Addison, Austin, Irving Park, Narragansett & Addison over normal route, due to street blockage near Addison/Melvina.

Eastbound buses are not affected.  Allow extra travel time.
